summary: Iteration 222: Full testing of new features — account-status endpoint, notification preferences panel, MiraMemoryCard on MiraOS, birthday box Akita fix, cake exclusion on Care page. All 10 backend tests passed and all frontend checks passed.

integration_issues.issue: Multiple console errors: 'TypeError: Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' at MiraOSPage chunk lines 2412, 2462, 2484, 2508. This appears in rapid re-mount cycles. MiraMemoryCard still renders correctly.

action_items: Investigate and fix 'body stream already read' error in MiraOSPage.jsx — multiple fetch chains may be consuming Response.json() twice or race condition on pet change. Check useEffect dependencies around fetch calls at approximate lines 580, 630, 644, 655.
critical_code_review_comments: MiraOSPage.jsx: 'TypeError: Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' — likely caused by a rapid pet-change useEffect re-run where stale fetch promises try to call .json() on a response body already consumed. Guard with AbortController or check if component is still mounted before calling .json().

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all core features working, 1 minor console error in MiraOSPage)

seed_data_creation: PUT /api/member/notification-preferences with test keys 'test_pet_222' and 'test_pet_all_types_222' for dipali
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Sprint features verified: (1) account-status returns tier=trial for trial user / tier=active for dipali. (2) Notification Preferences panel is live in Settings tab with 5 per-pet toggles (daily_digest, birthday_reminders, medication_reminders, order_updates, concierge_updates) — toggle interaction confirmed working. (3) MiraMemoryCard renders on MiraOS /mira-os-shell MOJO tab. (4) Birthday Box for Bruno (Labrador) has Cakes/Toys/Style/Memory/Wellness tabs with no Akita products. (5) Care page for Bruno shows no cake products. Minor: MiraOSPage has Response.json() consumed twice errors in console — doesn't break UI but should be fixed.

verified_features.account_status_trial: PASS — GET /api/auth/account-status returns {tier: 'trial', days_remaining: 30, can_book: true, is_paused: false}
verified_features.account_status_active: PASS — dipali returns {tier: 'active', can_book: true, is_paused: false}
verified_features.trial_banner_renders: PASS — data-testid='trial-banner-trial' visible with '✦Free Trial — 30 days left Upgrade ✕'
verified_features.no_trial_banner_active_user: PASS — no trial banner for dipali
verified_features.notification_prefs_get: PASS — GET /api/member/notification-preferences returns 200 with preferences object
verified_features.notification_prefs_put: PASS — PUT saves per-pet preferences, GET verifies persistence
verified_features.notification_prefs_ui_panel: PASS — Notification Preferences section visible in Settings tab with per-pet switcher + 5 toggles
verified_features.settings_toggles: PASS — All 5 toggles (daily_digest, birthday_reminders, medication_reminders, order_updates, concierge_updates) found and clickable
verified_features.birthday_box_no_akita: PASS — Birthday Box for Bruno (Labrador) shows Cakes/Toys/Style/Memory/Wellness tabs, no Akita products
verified_features.care_page_no_cake: PASS — Care page for Bruno shows no cake products
verified_features.mira_memory_card: PASS — data-testid='mira-memory-card' visible on MiraOS /mira-os-shell MOJO tab
